high_fidelity_structure: 390×844 竖屏高密度商城首页，无弹窗或抽屉。顶部为浅暖白状态栏；其下是横向分类标签栏，当前第二项以橙色文字及短下划线高亮。紧接着是白底、橙色描边的圆角搜索框，左侧为扫码样式图标，中部输入词，右侧有相机图标与橙色实心搜索按钮。搜索下方是两行五列的圆形/拟物快捷功能入口，图标色彩鲜明、文字深灰。之后为三列等宽促销卡片，浅粉底，分别展示食品、游戏配件、迷你设备等虚构插画商品。促销区下方是一条通栏鲜红优惠横幅，左边喇叭图标和白字文案，右侧白色优惠券按钮。主体商品流为双列瀑布卡片，左列略宽且首卡较高，右列商品卡从同一高度开始；卡片使用圆角图片区、品牌色小标题、深色标题、橙色价格和灰色销量。底部固定白色五项导航，首项为醒目的橙色圆形徽标，其余为线性图标；消息项带橙色99+角标。主要交互入口为分类标签、搜索框/搜索按钮、商品卡、优惠券领取按钮、加购按钮和底部导航。

replaced_source_assets.campaign: Summer Snack Week · save up to 18%

components.geometry: full 390×844 viewport, warm-white page background, content extends beneath fixed bottom navigation
44px high rounded orange outline; scanner left, editable central query, camera icon, orange search trigger right
2 rows × 5 columns with colorful 38–44px icons and centered labels
three equal pale-pink cards with heading, product illustration, red/orange price pill
full-width red rounded rectangle; announcement copy left and white coupon CTA right
white rounded product cards; imagery occupies upper 70%, title and metadata below
small orange rounded button in each product card footer; updates cart state
orange numeric badge anchored to the cart navigation icon

components.content: interaction feedback shown after search, coupon claim, or add-to-cart

inferred_interactions.effect: sets the orange underline and refreshes the two-column recommendations with that fictional category's products
filters recommendation-list to matching fictional products and displays qa-result with the result count
increments cart-count, changes the selected card action to Added, and updates qa-result
sets coupon_claimed true and changes the CTA to Claimed
updates the active navigation highlight; Home restores the discovery feed
